name: Middle Click Scroll
description: Ever had a broken scrollwheel and liked how chrome's middle click scroll worked, then this mod is for you!

scroll-speed-mult.name: Scroll Speed Multiplier
scroll-speed-mult.description: How much the <cy>scroll speed</c> is <co>multiplied</c> by. <cy>Scroll speed</c> is <co>calculated</c> by `(initialPoint - newPoint) * [value of this setting]`.

max-scroll-speed.name: Maximum Scroll Speed
max-scroll-speed.description: Sets the <cy>maximum speed limit</c> for <cl>middle click scrolling</c>.
